name: io.github.zoom/zoom-meetings
title: Zoom Meetings MCP Server
description: Zoom Meetings server for meeting search, recordings, transcripts, summaries, and meeting assets.

examples.name: Search meetings
examples.description: Find meetings by keyword and date range with meeting details and context.

examples.name: Review meeting assets
examples.description: Retrieve meeting summaries, transcripts, recordings, and related assets.

examples.name: Inspect recordings
examples.description: List cloud recordings and retrieve recording resources for follow-up workflows.
